name: Amroth to Wiseman's Bridge (low tide)
highlights: Scenic beach walk at low tide — dramatic cliffs and Somerset views.
points_of_interest: Fossil beds; submerged forest at very low tide
viewpoints: Worm's Head, Gower across Carmarthen Bay
food_drink_nearby: New Inn Amroth; Amroth Arms; Wiseman's Bridge Inn
hazards_notes: Only possible at low tide — check before going
